seoTitle: Tennyson vs Terang — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tennyson and Terang. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tennyson and Terang.
heading: Tennyson vs Terang — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tennyson, Victoria and Terang, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Terang has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Tennyson (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tennyson or Terang safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tennyson has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Terang scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tennyson scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Terang scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tennyson or Terang?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Terang has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
